chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 516 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 2349/25 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 13.05.2025. Mr. Javed Hussain Manik, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah Deputy Attorney General along with Nisar Ahmed Sawand Assistant Director FIA Sukkur. *********** Statement has been filed by Assistant Director/I.O FIA, Crime circle Sukkur, taken on record, copy whereof supplied to counsel for petitioner. Nisar Ahmed Sawand Investigating Officer FIA, Crime circle Sukkur present and submits that now FIR No.24/2024 of FIA Crime circle sukkur has been challaned. After such statement counsel for petitioner does not press the instant petition and submits that he will approach trial Court and will file appropriate application for pre-mature acquittal, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PS
